goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 13:15'.
The train should depart from 'leicester' and should leave on 'saturday'.
Make sure you get 'departure time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse' and should be in the 'east'.
The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and should 'include free parking'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'postcode', and 'star of the hotel'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 13:15
The train should depart from leicester and should leave on saturday
Make sure you get departure time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should be in the east
The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should include free parking
Make sure you get phone number, postcode, and star of the hotel
